text.title: c4-model Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for c4-model as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Mixing abstraction levels in one diagram (showing both containers and components).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Creates diagrams that are neither a Container diagram nor a Component diagram — readers cannot determine the scope and the diagram cannot be reviewed against the C4 rules for either level.
